title: Fasset Raises $51 Million to Expand Stablecoin-Focused Neobank
message_html: Fasset Raises $51 Million to Expand Stablecoin-Focused Neobank ...
snippet: Neobank Fasset has raised $51 million to expand its stablecoin-centric banking platform to emerging markets. The company said its Series B round, announced Thursday (May 14), will help it continue its work of serving customers in overlooked markets. These are people who are “locked out of opportunit

title: Bank of England to soften plans for stablecoin restrictions
message_html: Bank of England to soften plans for stablecoin restrictions ...
snippet: The Bank of England look set to ease planned stablecoin restrictions in the face of industry pushback, according to the Financial Times.
